people.name: Yunze Zhao
people.description: Second Year Ph.D. student at University of Maryland, College Park. He's passionate about building user focused secure and reliable software systems.

people.name: Yibo Zhao
people.description: Second Year Ph.D. student at University of Maryland, College Park. Yibo's research interests are broadly in networked systems and machine learning systems.

people.name: Zaoxing (Alan) Liu
people.description: Alan loves everything networked and distributed: from networked systems and their security issues to robust algorithms that can hack large-scale problems. Alan leads the FROOT lab at UMD to make systems Faster, more Future-pROOf, and more Trustworthy
